testcase.name: test_firewall_add_rule_rejects_invalid_port

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'execute_command' to not have been called. Called 1 times. Calls: [call('sudo ufw allow 22; whoami/tcp', {'host': 'example.com', 'user': 'root'}), call().__getitem__('exit_code'), call().__getitem__().__eq__(0), call().get('stderr', 'Unknown error'), call().get().__str__()].

testcase.failure: tests\test_security_commands.py:25: in test_firewall_add_rule_rejects_invalid_port mock_remote_ops.return_value.execute_command.assert_not_called() C:\Users\subdose\AppData\Roaming\uv\python\cpython-3.12.12-windows-x86_64-none\Lib\unittest\mock.py:910: in assert_not_called raise AssertionError(msg) E AssertionError: Expected 'execute_command' to not have been called. Called 1 times. E Calls: [call('sudo ufw allow 22; whoami/tcp', {'host': 'example.com', 'user': 'root'}), E call().__getitem__('exit_code'), E call().__getitem__().__eq__(0), E call().get('stderr', 'Unknown error'), E call().get().__str__()].

testcase.name: test_firewall_add_rule_rejects_invalid_allow_from

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'execute_command' to not have been called. Called 1 times. Calls: [call('sudo ufw allow from 0.0.0.0/0; whoami to any port 22 proto tcp', {'host': 'example.com', 'user': 'root'}), call().__getitem__('exit_code'), call().__getitem__().__eq__(0), call().get('stderr', 'Unknown error'), call().get().__str__()].

testcase.failure: tests\test_security_commands.py:37: in test_firewall_add_rule_rejects_invalid_allow_from mock_remote_ops.return_value.execute_command.assert_not_called() C:\Users\subdose\AppData\Roaming\uv\python\cpython-3.12.12-windows-x86_64-none\Lib\unittest\mock.py:910: in assert_not_called raise AssertionError(msg) E AssertionError: Expected 'execute_command' to not have been called. Called 1 times. E Calls: [call('sudo ufw allow from 0.0.0.0/0; whoami to any port 22 proto tcp', {'host': 'example.com', 'user': 'root'}), E call().__getitem__('exit_code'), E call().__getitem__().__eq__(0), E call().get('stderr', 'Unknown error'), E call().get().__str__()].

testcase.name: test_firewall_remove_rule_rejects_invalid_protocol

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'execute_command' to not have been called. Called 1 times. Calls: [call('sudo ufw delete allow 22/tcp; whoami', {'host': 'example.com', 'user': 'root'}), call().__getitem__('exit_code'), call().__getitem__().__eq__(0), call().get('stderr', 'Unknown error'), call().get().__str__()].

Called 1 times. E Calls: [call('sudo ufw delete allow 22/tcp; whoami', {'host': 'example.com', 'user': 'root'}), E call().__getitem__('exit_code'), E call().__getitem__().__eq__(0), E call().get('stderr', 'Unknown error'), E call().get().__str__()].

testcase.name: test_fail2ban_unban_rejects_invalid_jail_name

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'execute_command' to not have been called. Called 1 times. Calls: [call('sudo fail2ban-client set sshd; whoami unbanip 127.0.0.1', {'host': 'example.com', 'user': 'root'}), call().__getitem__('exit_code'), call().__getitem__().__eq__(0), call().get('stderr', 'Unknown error'), call().get().__str__()].

testcase.name: test_fail2ban_unban_rejects_invalid_ip

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'execute_command' to not have been called. Called 1 times. Calls: [call('sudo fail2ban-client set sshd unbanip 127.0.0.1; whoami', {'host': 'example.com', 'user': 'root'}), call().__getitem__('exit_code'), call().__getitem__().__eq__(0), call().get('stderr', 'Unknown error'), call().get().__str__()].
